description: As detailers when did we start treating each other like competition? I personally don’t have the energy to argue or go back and forth in comments. I don’t care how much you charge, what tools you use, or how you structure your business. At the end of the day, we all run things differently. What matters is pushing the craft forward. If it works for you and your customers are happy, that’s what counts. I’m not in the business of competing with other detailers. I’m in the business of completing the job the right way. If you’re building, learning, and serving your customers with pride, you’ve got my support.

layoutDescription: No card UI: sections flow with borders, rules, and background tints only; services as definition list or two-column prose + icons.
antiPatterns: Avoid generic 3-column icon cards. Copy must be specific to this Facebook page.
photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
